name: ido4-plugins
description: ido4 ecosystem plugins for Claude Code and Cowork

plugins.name: ido4shape
plugins.description: Specification discovery and writing for product managers, founders, and tech leads. Explores your problem space through guided conversation, builds a knowledge canvas, then synthesizes a structured strategic spec with stakeholder analysis, capability decomposition, dependencies, and success conditions.

plugins.name: ido4specs
plugins.description: Turn a strategic spec into a structurally-validated technical spec on disk. Companion plugin for engineers planning implementation work from an ido4shape strategic spec. Reads the strategic spec, explores your codebase via parallel Explore subagents, produces a technical canvas (name-tech-canvas.md), then synthesizes a methodology-neutral technical spec (name-tech-spec.md) with capability decomposition, task metadata (effort/risk/type/ai), and a dependency graph. Any downstream tool — or ido4dev:ingest-spec — can turn the file into GitHub issues.
